headline: OSB GROUP PLC - Transaction in Own Shares
summary: OSB GROUP PLCISIN: GB00BLDRH36030 March 2026 LEI number: 213800ZBKL9BHSL2K459 OSB GROUP PLC (the “Company”) Share Buyback Programme – Transactions in Own Shares The Company announces that, for the period from 23 March 2026 to 27 March 2026, inclusive, it had purchased a total of 839,507 of its ordinary shares of £0.01 each (the "ordinary shares") on the London Stock Exchange, CBOE BXE ,CBOE CXE and Aquis Exchange, through the Company’s broker Jefferies International Limited as detailed below.
